body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.

**Dynamic medial parietal and hippocampal deactivations under DMT relate to sympathetic output and altered sense of time, space, and the self.**. bioRxiv.. PMID: 38464275. DOI: 10.1101/2024.02.14.580356. N,N-Dimethyltryptamine (DMT) is aserotonergic psychedelic, known to rapidly induce short-lasting alterations in conscious experience, characterized by aprofound and immersive sense of physical transcendence alongside rich and vivid auditory distortions and visual imagery.
